message:
Presenton Desktop electron-v0.8.6-beta

Big upgrade for the Electron app with better exports, smarter AI integrations, improved editing workflows, and a more polished presentation experience overall. 🚀

What's New

✨ Presentation & Editor Improvements
• Chromium export support for improved presentation exports
• Stock image search integrated into the Image Editor
• Markdown editing improvements in outlines & text rendering
• Slide delete functionality added
• Dashboard redesigned into separate Action & Deck sections
• Theme and chat focus improvements
• Better template handling and custom layout support

🤖 AI & LLM Enhancements
• OpenAI-compatible image generation support
• LiteLLM support added
• Azure & Vertex AI provider support
• Improved model configuration handling
• Random seed support for ComfyUI image generation

🎨 Templates & UI
• New Pitch Deck template added
• Chart.js migration across all templates
• Different icon weight support across templates
• Improved multilingual support (Simplified & Traditional Chinese)

🛠️ Stability & Fixes
• Electron stability improvements from Sentry reports
• Better LibreOffice installation handling
• Improved API integration and export handling
• Next.js upgraded to latest version
• Fixes for onboarding, layouts, fonts, toast notifications, and exports
• Coverage configuration and testing setup improvements
